thread.title: Trump Cabinet Nominee Proposed Terrifying Role for Military

author: The New Republic
title: Trump Cabinet Nominee Proposed Terrifying Role for Military
text:
News PressBee .. The New Republic Watch the post from Trump Cabinet Nominee Proposed Terrifying Role for Military, Now to the details
Donald Trump’s Christian nationalist, crusades-obsessed defense secretary nominee expects the military to mobilize against U.S. citizens in a civil war.Pete Hegseth, a veteran and former Fox & Friends co-host, outlined a deeply troubling, extremist right-wing agenda for America’s future in his 2020 book American Crusade.“America will decline and die. A national divorce will ensue. Outnumbered freedom lovers will fight back,” Hegseth writes. “The military and police, both bastions of freedom-loving patriots, will be forced to make a choice. It will not be good. Yes, there will be some form of civil war.”In another section, Hegseth writes that “our present moment is much like the 11th Century.
trump cabinet nominee proposed terrifying role for military
